title: [codereview-pass1] heltec conf: WiFi Kconfig names may not match ESP32-S3 Zephyr driver (CONFIG_ESP32_WIFI_STA vs espressif specific); verify with west build. P2 correctness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-p12e
close_reason: Fixed WiFi Kconfig to use CONFIG_ESP32_WIFI_STA_RECONNECT matching Zephyr ESP32 driver; added missing stack/TC_TX/epoch/RX1 to T-Deck gateway conf and overlay; followed board patterns; 3 codereview passes clean after addressing comments and Kconfig; west builds verified in setup (epoch+board identifier fixed off-session); no dead code
